# Phase 2.1 DOC System Frontend Dev Readiness Checklist

- The public wrapper exists under `.github/agents/phase2.1-doc-system-frontend-dev.agent.md`.
- The human-facing root brief exists under `.github/Phase2_1_DOC_System_Frontend_Dev_Agent.md`.
- The specialist support spec exists under `.github/doc-system-phase2-1-frontend-dev/phase2.1-doc-system-frontend-dev-spec.md`.
- The readiness checklist exists under `.github/doc-system-phase2-1-frontend-dev/phase2.1-doc-system-frontend-dev-readiness-checklist.md`.
- Root registry documentation lists the new Phase 2.1 DOC-system specialist agent.
- The agent is described as an optional sibling to the standard Phase 2 DOC-system frontend dev agent, not a lane replacement.
- The agent preserves the same project-root, starter-bootstrap, preservation-matrix, and shared phase5-7 continuation contract.
- The agent explicitly adds specialist capability for visual-language direction, layout composition, design-system direction, interaction craft, motion direction, responsive intelligence, and frontend engineering discipline.
- The agent explicitly forbids generic repetitive SaaS layouts and scaled-desktop mobile behavior.
- The agent still requires build, lint, type, route-truthfulness, and runtime validation before completion.
